V-M-001.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_security.py -v

V-M-009.TESTS: frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx frontend/src/pages/VerifyEmail.tsx frontend/src/App.tsx frontend/src/lib/api.ts frontend/src/stores/auth.ts scripts/phase28-register-flow-smoke.mjs
V-M-009.COMMANDS: node scripts/phase28-register-flow-smoke.mjs; cd frontend && npm run build

V-M-010.TESTS: frontend-admin/src/main.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Users.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Analytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Servers.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Plans.tsx frontend-admin/src/lib/api.ts frontend-admin/src/types/index.ts frontend-admin/src/index.css
V-M-010.COMMANDS: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; Phase-24 route/API binding guard for /, /users, /devices, /analytics and existing adminApi endpoint names

V-M-011.COMMANDS: static review of telegram-bot/bot.py call surfaces

V-M-012.COMMANDS: bash -n deploy/deploy-on-server.sh && bash -n deploy/deploy-all.sh && bash -n deploy/quick-start.sh && bash -n deploy/create-client.sh && bash -n deploy/remove-client.sh && bash -n deploy/rollback.sh && bash -n deploy/backup-db.sh && bash -n install.sh

V-M-017.COMMANDS: python -m py_compile backend/app/routing/manager.py backend/app/routing/router.py && bash -n deploy/deploy-on-server.sh

V-M-022.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_verified_registration.py tests/test_device_api.py tests/test_vpn_router_compat.py -v

V-M-025.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_device_audit_log.py -v

V-M-026.COMMANDS: static review plus targeted middleware tests when admin audit test suite is added

V-M-027.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_security.py -v -k blacklist

V-M-028.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_db_migrations.py -v

V-M-029.COMMANDS: docker compose config && bash -n deploy/*.sh && bash -n install.sh && cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../frontend-admin && npm run build

V-M-030.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_awg_obfuscation.py tests/test_vpn_stealth_config.py tests/test_db_migrations.py tests/test_deploy_awg_obfuscation_static.py -v && cd .. && bash -n deploy/lib/awg-obfuscation.sh deploy/deploy-on-server.sh deploy/deploy-all.sh install.sh

V-M-031.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_anti_ping_pong_detector.py tests/test_handshake_anomaly_detector.py tests/test_scheduler.py tests/test_device_access_policy.py tests/test_device_audit_log.py tests/test_admin_device_control.py -v

V-M-032.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_vpn_network_addressing.py tests/test_deploy_network_subnets_static.py tests/test_vpn_service.py tests/test_manual_client_cli.py tests/test_device_api.py -v && cd .. && bash -n install.sh deploy/deploy-on-server.sh deploy/deploy-all.sh deploy/lib/vpn-network.sh

V-M-033.COMMANDS: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/current-status.xml docs/handoff/STABILIZATION-PHASE-26.xml; mygrace lint; cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' --collect-only -q

V-M-034.COMMANDS: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-22.xml docs/modules/M-034.xml docs/recovery/DR-PHASE-22.xml docs/recovery/DRY-RUN-PHASE-22.xml docs/verification/V-M-034.xml && mygrace lint; manual live-required DR walkthrough using existing deploy/install scripts unchanged

V-M-035.COMMANDS: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-22.xml docs/modules/M-035.xml docs/recovery/BACKUP-PHASE-22.xml docs/recovery/DRY-RUN-PHASE-22.xml docs/verification/V-M-035.xml && mygrace lint; planned non-production pg_dump/pg_restore dry-run plus checksum and secret-redaction evidence

V-M-036.COMMANDS: cd frontend && npm run build; Phase-23 mobile smoke for /, /config, and /subscription at 360x740, 390x844, and 430x932; assert scrollWidth <= innerWidth and primary config path <= 2 taps

V-M-037.TESTS: frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Users.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Analytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/StatCard.tsx frontend-admin/src/index.css frontend-admin/src/lib/api.ts frontend-admin/src/types/index.ts
V-M-037.COMMANDS: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; Phase-24 Chrome/CDP mobile smoke for /, /users, /devices, and /analytics at 360x740, 390x844, and 430x932; assert scrollWidth <= innerWidth, device actions require confirmation, and excluded deploy/install surfaces have no diff

V-M-038.TESTS: frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend/src/pages/Config.tsx frontend/src/pages/Subscription.tsx frontend/src/index.css frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Users.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Analytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/StatCard.tsx frontend-admin/src/index.css
V-M-038.COMMANDS: cd frontend && npm run build; Phase-23 compact UI static review and mobile viewport smoke; cd ../frontend-admin && npm run build; Phase-24 admin compact UI static review and Chrome/CDP mobile viewport smoke before full M-038 closure

V-M-039.TESTS: scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs docs/security/SESSION-PHASE-25.xml frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx frontend/src/pages/VerifyEmail.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend-admin/src/stores/auth.ts

V-M-045.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_mtproto_api.py tests/test_mtproto_assignment_registry.py tests/test_mtproto_provisioning.py -v; cd ../frontend && npm run build; cd .. && node scripts/phase31-mtproto-cabinet-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase34-mtproto-stabilization-smoke.mjs

V-M-046.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_domain_tls_edge_static.py -v && cd .. && sh -c 'if [ -e .env ]; then DB_PASSWORD=phase32-compose-check docker compose config; else ln -s .env.example .env && trap "rm -f .env" EXIT && DB_PASSWORD=phase32-compose-check docker compose config; fi' && node scripts/phase32-edge-contract-smoke.mjs && node scripts/phase34-mtproto-stabilization-smoke.mjs && python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-32.xml docs/modules/M-046.xml docs/verification/V-M-046.xml docs/edge/PHASE-32-CUTOVER.xml docs/handoff/PHASE-34-RELEASE-CHECKLIST.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml && mygrace lint; operator-live smoke after DNS and wildcard TLS are ready

V-M-047.TESTS: backend/tests/test_mtproto_admin_ops.py backend/tests/test_admin_device_control.py backend/tests/test_mtproto_assignment_registry.py backend/tests/test_kpproton_runtime_bridge.py frontend-admin/src/lib/api.ts frontend-admin/src/types/index.ts frontend-admin/src/main.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProto.tsx scripts/phase33-mtproto-admin-smoke.mjs scripts/phase34-mtproto-stabilization-smoke.mjs
V-M-047.COMMANDS: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_mtproto_admin_ops.py tests/test_admin_device_control.py tests/test_mtproto_assignment_registry.py tests/test_kpproton_runtime_bridge.py -v; cd ../frontend-admin && npm run build; cd .. && node scripts/phase33-mtproto-admin-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase34-mtproto-stabilization-smoke.mjs; python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-33.xml docs/modules/M-047.xml docs/verification/V-M-047.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml && mygrace lint

V-M-048.COMMANDS: bash -n install.sh deploy/deploy-on-server.sh && node scripts/phase35-installer-wildcard-tls-smoke.mjs && cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_domain_tls_edge_static.py -v && cd .. && python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-35.xml docs/modules/M-048.xml docs/verification/V-M-048.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml && mygrace lint; operator-live clean VPS install with prepared wildcard cert files and RU openssl bootstrap
